ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2020 Continued To Jun-30-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Chad Gaines To Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MARTINA ERHART, GEARY STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF CHAD GAINES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

Appearances: Iian Rosen Janfaza of the Law Offices of Iian N. Rosen Janfaza (310.550.1000) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; Donald Zalewski of Trachtman & Trachtman, LLP (949.282.0100) appearing via Court Call for defendants and moving parties.

Counsel stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Argued as to the issue of sanctions. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' Motion to Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Chad Gaines To Defendants' Form Interrogatories, Set One, Including Monetary Sanctions ("Motion") is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. Plaintiff does not oppose the Motion to the extent it seeks to compel further responses, and thus it is granted to that extent. The Motion is denied to the extent it seeks sanctions because the Declaration of Donald Zalewski fails to state why Plaintiff sought an extension on December 26, 2019, and why it was denied. It also is unclear from the parties' submissions whether Plaintiff has served supplemental responses. Thus, the Court cannot conclude that Defendant made a reasonable and good faith attempt to resolve informally the issues raised in the Motion. (See Code Civ. Proc., 2025.480(b).) If Plaintiff has not served supplemental verified responses, then he must do so no later than March 27, 2020. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Maxwell Pritt, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/JPT)
